introSection: Drakenbaan is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Zamperla currently located at Speelpark Oud Valkeveen in Naarden, North Holland, Netherlands.
fullText: Drakenbaan is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Zamperla currently located at Speelpark Oud Valkeveen in Naarden, North Holland, Netherlands.
